title: SPARK Nonprofit Accelerator
description: SPARK Nonprofit Accelerator is a capacity-building accelerator from Inspire Brands Foundation for nonprofits, NGOs, or other mission-driven organizations working toward measurable social impact.
eligibility: Mission-driven organizations must satisfy the current legal-status, impact, stage, location, and cohort requirements.
value: Cohort training, expert support, peer learning, and program-specific resources
